allow: Bash(mkdir -p gui/ui gui/assets backend/device_server backend/camera_server backend/voice_server inc docs 2>/dev/null; echo "dirs created"; find . -maxdepth 1 -type d | sort)
Bash(mkdir -p libs/jsonrpc && mv libs/jsonrpc-c/* libs/jsonrpc/ && mv libs/libev libs/jsonrpc/ && rmdir libs/jsonrpc-c && echo "done"; ls libs/jsonrpc/; echo "==="; ls libs/jsonrpc/libev/ | head -10)
